programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Travelling to Malta in search of answers about his past, Alex and his best friends Tom and Kyra uncover the beginnings of a deadly plot and the identity of Scorpia's charismatic new leader.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As the Department receive a horrifying threat against the United Kingdom, Alex follows the trail of a shady scientist working for Scorpia to a secret laboratory aboard a decommissioned ship.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex has been captured and Tom, Kyra and Jack must scramble to find him. As Scorpia demonstrate the power of their new weapon, Invisible Sword, Alex is confronted by Julia Rothman with some uncomfortable truths about his father.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Cut off from his friends and forced to work with one of his greatest foes, Alex endures a punishing induction to Scorpia, and must face off against a gang of ruthless trainee assassins.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To prove his loyalty Alex is sent on a mission for Scorpia, with Tom and Kyra following close behind hoping to rescue him. Meanwhile the Department attempt to unlock the secret of Invisible Sword.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex returns home with a dark mission of revenge. Jack, Tom and Kyra must enlist the help of unlikely allies to save Alex before he commits to Scorpia forever.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Captured and questioned by the Department, Alex must rely on his friends to remind him who he truly is. But are there still truths about his past the Department haven't told him?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Scorpia orchestrate the final stages of their plan to threaten the lives of an entire British city, Alex must again go back undercover in a desperate bid to stop Julia Rothman before it's too late.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Travelling to Malta in search of answers about his past, Alex and his best friends Tom and Kyra uncover the beginnings of a deadly plot and the identity of Scorpia's charismatic new leader.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As the Department receive a horrifying threat against the United Kingdom, Alex follows the trail of a shady scientist working for Scorpia to a secret laboratory aboard a decommissioned ship.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex has been captured and Tom, Kyra and Jack must scramble to find him. As Scorpia demonstrate the power of their new weapon, Invisible Sword, Alex is confronted by Julia Rothman with some uncomfortable truths about his father.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Cut off from his friends and forced to work with one of his greatest foes, Alex endures a punishing induction to Scorpia, and must face off against a gang of ruthless trainee assassins.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To prove his loyalty Alex is sent on a mission for Scorpia, with Tom and Kyra following close behind hoping to rescue him. Meanwhile the Department attempt to unlock the secret of Invisible Sword.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex returns home with a dark mission of revenge. Jack, Tom and Kyra must enlist the help of unlikely allies to save Alex before he commits to Scorpia forever.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Captured and questioned by the Department, Alex must rely on his friends to remind him who he truly is. But are there still truths about his past the Department haven't told him?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Scorpia orchestrate the final stages of their plan to threaten the lives of an entire British city, Alex must again go back undercover in a desperate bid to stop Julia Rothman before it's too late.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Travelling to Malta in search of answers about his past, Alex and his best friends Tom and Kyra uncover the beginnings of a deadly plot and the identity of Scorpia's charismatic new leader.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As the Department receive a horrifying threat against the United Kingdom, Alex follows the trail of a shady scientist working for Scorpia to a secret laboratory aboard a decommissioned ship.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex has been captured and Tom, Kyra and Jack must scramble to find him. As Scorpia demonstrate the power of their new weapon, Invisible Sword, Alex is confronted by Julia Rothman with some uncomfortable truths about his father.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess is sent to North Carolina to help find a woman who disappeared from an aircraft seemingly in-flight.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The death of a powerful Cleveland organized crime boss draws Jess into a potentially deadly search for the mobster's missing wife.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The search for a bone marrow donor sends Brooke and Jess looking for a man who has disappeared from the witness protection program.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Brook leaves no stone unturned while investigating the disappearance of Eric's close friend, a former Russian mail order bride.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: The search for a fugitive soldier thought to have died seventeen years ago leads Brooke and Jess into the middle of a Bolivian drug smuggling ring.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Brooke puts her career on the line in order to save an innocent man from being executed for murder.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Word of a wealthy couple's disappearance sends Brooke and Jess deep into a remote wilderness area to find them and their Eco-terrorist kidnappers.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: A depressed schizophrenic's disappearance puts an innocent boy in danger as it threatens to expose a psychiatrist's role in a patient's death.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Jess is sent to North Carolina to help find a woman who disappeared from an aircraft seemingly in-flight.
